Petition For Court Determination Of The Persons Entitled To Distributions From The Decedent?S Probate Estate Where Testamentary Dispositions Do Not Name Actual Devisees
Off Calendar Aug-05-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Mario G. Paolini, Jr., 415-586-3600 for Executor Richard Michael Diles who is also present in the Courtroom.
No other Appearance.

RULING - The matter is Uncontested/Discussed. Counsel informs the Court status of the case. There is no objection on petition. The Court having reviewed the pleadings rules as follows:

Petition for Determination of the Persons entitled to distributions from the decedent's probate estate where testamentary dispositions Do not name Actual Devisees. (Probate Code Section 11700)

The petition is granted. Order is signed in open court. Counsel's request to continue is granted.

The hearing of Septemeber 14, 2022 is continued to December 14, 2022, Wednesday at 9:000 am in Dept. 210. Counsel to submit a status report 5 days prior to the hearing.

Judge: Vedica Puri, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (210/VP)
